mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS serialNo, p.payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, p.order_no AS businessOrderNo, CONCAT(p.payment_order_id, '-REQ') AS paymentRequestNo, 'housekeeping-admin' AS applicationSourceId, 'housekeeping-service' AS businessLineId, p.channel_transaction_no AS externalTransactionNo, CASE WHEN p.channel_code LIKE 'wx%' THEN '微信支付网关' WHEN p.channel_code LIKE 'alipay%' THEN '支付宝支付网关' WHEN p.channel_code LIKE '%bank%' OR p.channel_code = 'offline_bank' THEN '银行支付网关' ELSE '统一支付网关' END AS paymentGateway, p.channel_code AS paymentChannel, '消费支付' AS paymentType, CASE p.status WHEN 'SUCCESS' THEN '支付成功' WHEN 'WAIT_CALLBACK' THEN '支付中' WHEN 'CLOSED' THEN '已关闭' WHEN 'FAIL' THEN '支付失败' ELSE p.status END AS paymentStatus, CASE WHEN p.channel_code LIKE '%bank%' OR p.channel_code = 'offline_bank' THEN '招商银行' ELSE '—' END AS bankName, CASE WHEN p.channel_code LIKE '%bank%' OR p.channel_code = 'offline_bank' THEN '54**54' ELSE '—' END AS cardNo, CASE WHEN p.status = 'SUCCESS' THEN '200' WHEN p.status = 'WAIT_CALLBACK' THEN '100' ELSE '400' END AS channelReturnCode, CASE WHEN p.channel_code LIKE 'wx%' THEN '预支付标识' WHEN p.channel_code LIKE 'alipay%' THEN '支付宝订单号' ELSE '银行流水号' END AS returnParameterType, p.channel_transaction_no AS parameterValue, '1小时' AS validityPeriod, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(p.amount, 2)) AS paymentAmount, 0 AS refundCount, '¥0.00' AS refundedAmount, CONCAT('家政服务-', p.order_no, '-订单支付') AS productName, CONCAT('user-', p.customer_name) AS userPaymentChannelId, '123' AS receivingAccount, 'https://pay.housekeeping.local/callback' AS notifyUrl, 'payment.payment-result' AS callbackMqTopic, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(p.created_at, INTERVAL 1 HOUR), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expireTime, DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt, CASE WHEN p.status = 'SUCCESS' THEN DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ELSE NULL END AS paidAt, CONCAT('user-', p.customer_name) AS userId, p.status_type AS statusType FROM t_payment_order p
(p.channel_code LIKE 'wx%' OR p.payment_method = '微信' OR p.channel_code LIKE 'alipay%' OR p.payment_method = '支付宝')
(p.channel_code LIKE '%bank%' OR p.payment_method = '银行卡')
AND p.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
AND p.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{businessOrderNo}, '%')
AND '消费支付' = #{paymentType}
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_order p
(p.channel_code LIKE 'wx%' OR p.payment_method = '微信' OR p.channel_code LIKE 'alipay%' OR p.payment_method = '支付宝')
(p.channel_code LIKE '%bank%' OR p.payment_method = '银行卡')
AND p.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
AND p.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{businessOrderNo}, '%')
AND '消费支付' = #{paymentType}

SELECT p.id AS serialNo, p.payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, p.order_no AS businessOrderNo, CONCAT(p.payment_order_id, '-REQ') AS paymentRequestNo, 'housekeeping-admin' AS applicationSourceId, 'housekeeping-service' AS businessLineId, p.channel_transaction_no AS externalTransactionNo, CASE WHEN p.channel_code LIKE 'wx%' THEN '微信支付网关' WHEN p.channel_code LIKE 'alipay%' THEN '支付宝支付网关' WHEN p.channel_code LIKE '%bank%' OR p.channel_code = 'offline_bank' THEN '银行支付网关' ELSE '统一支付网关' END AS paymentGateway, p.channel_code AS paymentChannel, COALESCE(pa.payment_method, p.payment_method) AS paymentMethod, '消费支付' AS paymentType, CASE p.status WHEN 'SUCCESS' THEN '支付成功' WHEN 'WAIT_CALLBACK' THEN '支付中' WHEN 'CLOSED' THEN '已关闭' WHEN 'FAIL' THEN '支付失败' ELSE p.status END AS paymentStatus, CASE WHEN p.channel_code LIKE '%bank%' OR p.channel_code = 'offline_bank' THEN '招商银行' ELSE '—' END AS bankName, CASE WHEN p.channel_code LIKE '%bank%' OR p.channel_code = 'offline_bank' THEN '54**54' ELSE '—' END AS cardNo, CASE WHEN p.status = 'SUCCESS' THEN '200' WHEN p.status = 'WAIT_CALLBACK' THEN '100' ELSE '400' END AS channelReturnCode, CASE WHEN p.channel_code LIKE 'wx%' THEN '预支付标识' WHEN p.channel_code LIKE 'alipay%' THEN '支付宝订单号' ELSE '银行流水号' END AS returnParameterType, p.channel_transaction_no AS parameterValue, '1小时' AS validityPeriod, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(p.amount, 2)) AS paymentAmount, 0 AS refundCount, '¥0.00' AS refundedAmount, CONCAT('家政服务-', p.order_no, '-订单支付') AS productName, CONCAT('user-', p.customer_name) AS userPaymentChannelId, '123' AS receivingAccount, 'https://pay.housekeeping.local/callback' AS notifyUrl, 'payment.payment-result' AS callbackMqTopic, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(p.created_at, INTERVAL 1 HOUR), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expireTime, DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt, CASE WHEN p.status = 'SUCCESS' THEN DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ELSE NULL END AS paidAt, CONCAT('user-', p.customer_name) AS userId, p.status_type AS statusType, pa.terminal AS latestTerminal, pa.client_ip AS latestClientIp, pa.idempotency_key AS latestIdempotencyKey, pa.attempt_status AS latestAttemptStatus, pa.attempt_status_type AS latestAttemptStatusType, pa.request_payload AS latestRequestPayload, pa.response_payload AS latestResponsePayload FROM t_payment_order p LEFT JOIN t_payment_attempt pa ON pa.payment_order_id = p.payment_order_id AND pa.created_at = ( SELECT MAX(inner_pa.created_at) FROM t_payment_attempt inner_pa WHERE inner_pa.payment_order_id = p.payment_order_id ) WHERE p.payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId} LIMIT 1
